Rocky API implementation and definitions for Pebble firmware, including communication, graphics, memory, and utility functions.


## Files
- **[rocky_api.c](rocky_api.c.md)**: Initializes and deinitializes the Rocky API for watchface applications, integrating various subsystems.
- **[rocky_api.h](rocky_api.h.md)**: Defines the RockyGlobalAPI structure and functions for event handling in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_app_message.c](rocky_api_app_message.c.md)**: Handles communication between the Pebble app and connected devices using a message queue system with JSON serialization and deserialization.
- **[rocky_api_app_message.h](rocky_api_app_message.h.md)**: Defines message types, payload structures, and states for the postMessage protocol in Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_console.c](rocky_api_console.c.md)**: Implements a JavaScript console API for logging messages with different severity levels in Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_console.h](rocky_api_console.h.md)**: Declares the external constant `CONSOLE_APIS` for RockyJS API console functionality.
- **[rocky_api_datetime.c](rocky_api_datetime.c.md)**: Implements date and time localization functions for the Rocky.js API in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_datetime.h](rocky_api_datetime.h.md)**: Declares the external constant `DATETIME_APIS` for datetime functionalities in Rocky API.
- **[rocky_api_errors.c](rocky_api_errors.c.md)**: Error handling functions for RockyJS API, including argument validation and memory error reporting.
- **[rocky_api_errors.h](rocky_api_errors.h.md)**: Defines functions for handling and printing various Rocky API errors in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_global.c](rocky_api_global.c.md)**: Implements event listener management and global API initialization for the RockyJS environment.
- **[rocky_api_global.h](rocky_api_global.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, deinitializing, and handling evented APIs in the RockyJS environment.
- **[rocky_api_graphics.c](rocky_api_graphics.c.md)**: Graphics API implementation for Pebble firmware, including canvas context creation and drawing functions.
- **[rocky_api_graphics.h](rocky_api_graphics.h.md)**: Defines graphics API for RockyJS, including a function to get the graphics context.
- **[rocky_api_graphics_color.c](rocky_api_graphics_color.c.md)**: Defines functions and macros for parsing and converting color values in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_graphics_color.h](rocky_api_graphics_color.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for parsing and converting color values in the Rocky API.
- **[rocky_api_graphics_path2d.c](rocky_api_graphics_path2d.c.md)**: Implements 2D path drawing functions for a graphics API, including methods for arcs, rectangles, and lines.
- **[rocky_api_graphics_path2d.h](rocky_api_graphics_path2d.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing 2D path graphics in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_graphics_text.c](rocky_api_graphics_text.c.md)**: Implements text rendering functions for the Pebble firmware, including text alignment and font management.
- **[rocky_api_graphics_text.h](rocky_api_graphics_text.h.md)**: Defines functions and structures for managing text graphics in the Rocky API.
- **[rocky_api_memory.c](rocky_api_memory.c.md)**: Manages memory pressure events and headroom allocation for the Rocky API in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_memory.h](rocky_api_memory.h.md)**: Defines memory-related API constants and declarations for the RockyJS environment.
- **[rocky_api_preferences.c](rocky_api_preferences.c.md)**: Implements user preferences management for the Rocky API, including content size handling.
- **[rocky_api_preferences.h](rocky_api_preferences.h.md)**: Declares an external constant for RockyGlobalAPI related to preferences.
- **[rocky_api_tickservice.c](rocky_api_tickservice.c.md)**: Implements a tick service API for handling time-based events in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_tickservice.h](rocky_api_tickservice.h.md)**: Declares an external constant for the RockyGlobalAPI related to tick services.
- **[rocky_api_timers.c](rocky_api_timers.c.md)**: Implements timer functions for setting, clearing, and managing intervals and timeouts in RockyJS.
- **[rocky_api_timers.h](rocky_api_timers.h.md)**: Declares the external constant `TIMER_APIS` for timer-related API functions in RockyJS.
- **[rocky_api_util.c](rocky_api_util.c.md)**: Utility functions for interacting with JerryScript values and managing JavaScript objects in Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_util.h](rocky_api_util.h.md)**: Utilities for managing JerryScript values and functions, including error handling and object creation.
- **[rocky_api_util_args.c](rocky_api_util_args.c.md)**: Utility functions for argument type checking and assignment in the Rocky API.
- **[rocky_api_util_args.h](rocky_api_util_args.h.md)**: Defines data structures and macros for binding JavaScript arguments to C types in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rocky_api_watchinfo.c](rocky_api_watchinfo.c.md)**: Implements functions to retrieve and populate watch information such as platform, model, language, and firmware version.
- **[rocky_api_watchinfo.h](rocky_api_watchinfo.h.md)**: Declares the external constant `WATCHINFO_APIS` of type `RockyGlobalAPI`.
